neighborhoods.name: Logan Square
neighborhoods.description: Trendy, historic, and known for its vibrant arts scene and great food.

neighborhoods.name: Hyde Park
neighborhoods.description: Home to the University of Chicago, with rich history and lakefront access.

neighborhoods.name: Lincoln Park
neighborhoods.description: Upscale, beautiful parks, and proximity to the lake and zoo.

neighborhoods.name: Rogers Park
neighborhoods.description: Diverse, affordable, and right on the lake at the northern edge of the city.

neighborhoods.name: Wicker Park
neighborhoods.description: Nightlife hub with boutiques, coffee shops, and easy Blue Line access.

neighborhoods.name: Avondale
neighborhoods.description: Up-and-coming neighborhood with a mix of industrial and residential charm.

neighborhoods.name: Bridgeport
neighborhoods.description: Historic south side neighborhood with a strong community feel.

neighborhoods.name: Albany Park
neighborhoods.description: One of the most diverse neighborhoods in the US, known for its global cuisine.
